## North American Immersion
### Why attend an english language school in North America?
With a 4.8-star rating across 195 student reviews, choosing the right english language school defines your study abroad trip. Results matter. Our english language school operates accredited campuses in San Diego, California, Los Angeles, California, and Vancouver, British Columbia. As an institution recognized by the Commission on English Language Program Accreditation (CEA), we pair small class sizes with highly qualified teachers to build real fluency. Students from Brazil, Switzerland, South Korea, and dozens of other nations arrive every Tuesday to begin their studies. You will practice conversation naturally while living near beaches or busy downtown centers. Small groups mean your teachers know your name and your personal goals. The focus remains strictly on practical communication, pronunciation, and listening comprehension. We designed these locations to give you immediate access to local culture outside the classroom.
word_to:
## Imersão na América do Norte
### Por que estudar em uma escola de idiomas na América do Norte?
Com uma avaliação de 4,8 estrelas em 195 avaliações de alunos, a escolha da escola de inglês certa define o seu intercâmbio. Os resultados importam. A nossa escola de idiomas opera campi credenciados em San Diego, California, Los Angeles, California, e Vancouver, British Columbia. Sendo uma instituição reconhecida pela Commission on English Language Program Accreditation (CEA), combinamos turmas pequenas com professores altamente qualificados para construir uma fluência real. Estudantes do Brasil, da Suíça, da Coreia do Sul e de dezenas de outras nações chegam toda terça-feira para iniciar os estudos. Você praticará a conversação naturalmente enquanto mora perto de praias ou centros comerciais movimentados. Grupos pequenos significam que os seus professores conhecem o seu nome e os seus objetivos pessoais. O foco permanece estritamente na comunicação prática, na pronúncia e na compreensão auditiva. ## California Teen Experience
### What is the CEL summer camp in San Diego?
word_to:
## California Teen Experience
### O que é o acampamento de verão da CEL em San Diego?

word_from: CEL's English summer camp in San Diego is a residential English-language program for teenagers aged 14 to 18. This specialized track combines morning classes at the Downtown San Diego campus with afternoon and weekend excursions across Southern California. Accredited by the Commission on English Language Program Accreditation (CEA), the program groups international students into small classes averaging 7 participants, capped at 12. The camp runs annually from late June into early August; the 2025 session takes place from June 28 to August 9. Students benefit from a structured [English language program](https://www.englishcollege.com/courses) that integrates rigorous academic preparation with supervised homestay accommodation. By blending classroom instruction with cultural activities, the curriculum ensures rapid skill acquisition. Teenagers practice their conversation skills daily with native English speakers while exploring iconic local landmarks like Pacific Beach.
word_to: O acampamento de verão de inglês da CEL em San Diego é um programa residencial para adolescentes de 14 a 18 anos. Esta modalidade especializada combina aulas matinais no campus do centro de San Diego com excursões à tarde e aos finais de semana por todo o sul da Califórnia. Credenciado pela Commission on English Language Program Accreditation (CEA), o programa agrupa estudantes internacionais em turmas pequenas, com média de 7 participantes e limite de 12. O acampamento ocorre anualmente do final de junho até o início de agosto. A sessão de 2025 acontece de 28 de junho a 9 de agosto. Os alunos aproveitam um [programa de inglês](https://www.englishcollege.com/pt/cursos) bem estruturado que integra preparação acadêmica com acomodação supervisionada em host family. Ao misturar instrução em sala de aula com atividades culturais, o currículo garante a aquisição rápida de habilidades. Os adolescentes praticam suas habilidades de conversação diariamente com falantes nativos de inglês enquanto conhecem pontos turísticos locais, como Pacific Beach.

word_from: The fee covers tuition, host-family lodging, and the included excursion program, so families budget for 1 combined trip rather than a list of separate add-ons. Participants can fully focus on their linguistic progress and social connections without worrying about hidden costs. Many attendees form lifelong friendships with peers from Switzerland, Brazil, South Korea, and Germany. The school prioritizes a diverse nationality mix. This encourages students to communicate exclusively in English throughout the day. New participants arrive every Monday for standard classes. The campus serves as a safe, welcoming hub for teenagers to experience American culture firsthand while developing global competencies.

A localização no centro da cidade coloca os adolescentes bem no meio de um local costeiro movimentado, mantendo um ambiente altamente supervisionado. #### How do the language tracks differ?
Students choose between 2 distinct academic pathways. The General English track accepts teenagers at any proficiency level and focuses on speaking, listening, reading, and writing skills. These standard sessions start every Monday throughout the season. Alternatively, older teenagers can enroll in the Future Global Leaders program. This intensive option is a project-based course covering business and cross-cultural communication. It runs in specialized 3-week sessions starting July 1. Admission into the leadership track requires a minimum Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR) level B2. Because both tracks follow our small-class teaching model, teachers customize their feedback for every individual. It works. To understand the baseline requirements for advanced study, parents often review the [US education system pathways](https://www.englishcollege.com/pathway/us-education-system).
word_to:
#### Como as modalidades de idioma se diferenciam?
Os alunos escolhem entre 2 caminhos acadêmicos distintos. A modalidade de inglês geral aceita adolescentes de qualquer nível de proficiência e foca nas habilidades de fala, escuta, leitura e escrita. Estas sessões padrão começam toda segunda-feira ao longo da temporada. Como alternativa, os adolescentes mais velhos podem se inscrever no programa Future Global Leaders. ## University Transition Preparation
### What is a USA pathway program?
A USA pathway program at the College of English Language (CEL) is a structured route connecting intensive language study with admission to over 10,000 university degrees. Accredited by the Commission on English Language Program Accreditation (CEA), this timeline spans two semesters totaling 9 to 10 months. It actively transforms intermediate English proficiency into confident, direct university enrollment. Taught primarily at our campus in San Diego, California (with additional options to study near Los Angeles, California or Vancouver, British Columbia), these courses average just seven students and strictly cap at 12. You receive dedicated support from academic advisors who help shortlist target universities, gather transcripts, and process complex admission documentation. Beyond general vocabulary practice, the curriculum specifically targets the academic conventions required by American higher education. This direct transition removes the common friction of international admissions. You focus completely on your future degree.

word_from: What do certificate programs in the USA offer for international students? CEL's certificate programs in the USA combine 2 semesters of academic study at our San Diego, California campus with up to 12 months of paid work in the United States through Optional Practical Training (OPT). This pathway gives international students both a formal credential and meaningful work experience inside the US economy. The program is delivered in a focused environment with an average of 7 students and a maximum of 12 per class. Participants connect with partner colleges across the country, including Florida State University, San Diego State University, and the University of California Los Angeles (UCLA). CEL is certified by the Student and Exchange Visitor Information System (SEVIS) and accredited by the Commission on English Language Program Accreditation (CEA). This accreditation means the school can issue the Form I-20 that students need to apply for an F-1 Student Visa to begin their studies.

word_from: Mastering everyday communication in a general english course at the College of English Language (CEL) typically takes 12 to 24 weeks. Accredited by the Accrediting Council for Continuing Education and Training (ACCET) in the United States and Languages Canada, this foundation program serves learners aiming for baseline fluency rather than immediate university entry. Classes focus on the speaking, listening, reading, and writing skills necessary for daily life in San Diego, California, Los Angeles, California, or Vancouver, British Columbia. Instructors adapt weekly topics directly based on the immediate needs of the room. Absolute beginners start with essential survival phrases. Advanced students often debate global news. Teachers tailor the syllabus so students can confidently navigate real-world situations, from ordering food to understanding casual conversation. Yes. This is exactly where most students begin before moving to specialized tracks.
word_to: Dominar a comunicação do dia a dia em um curso de inglês geral na College of English Language (CEL) normalmente leva de 12 a 24 semanas. Com acreditação do Accrediting Council for Continuing Education and Training (ACCET) nos Estados Unidos e da Languages Canada, este programa de base atende estudantes que buscam fluência inicial em vez de ingresso imediato na universidade. As aulas focam nas habilidades de fala, escuta, leitura e escrita necessárias para a vida diária em San Diego, na California, Los Angeles, na California, ou Vancouver, na British Columbia. Os professores adaptam os tópicos semanais diretamente com base nas necessidades imediatas da turma. Iniciantes absolutos começam com frases essenciais de sobrevivência. Alunos avançados frequentemente debatem notícias globais. Os professores ajustam o plano de ensino para que os estudantes possam lidar com confiança em situações do mundo real, desde fazer o pedido de comida até entender conversas informais. Sim. É exatamente aqui que a maioria dos alunos começa antes de mudar para trilhas especializadas.

word_from: Once students reach a B2 level on the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR) scale, their goals often shift. A general english curriculum builds everyday fluency, but it does not train you for specific test formats. Students aiming for higher education usually transition to [specific test strategies](https://www.englishcollege.com/courses/english-plus-toefl-exam-preparation) or explore [our US university pathway options](https://www.englishcollege.com/pathway-program-usa). The conversational base built here makes those advanced academic steps much easier.

Um currículo de inglês geral constrói fluência diária, mas não treina você para formatos específicos de testes. Os estudantes que almejam o ensino superior geralmente fazem a transição para [estratégias de testes específicas](https://www.englishcollege.com/pt/cursos/english-plus-toefl-exam) ou avaliam [nossas opções de programa de pasarela universitária nos EUA](https://www.englishcollege.com/pt/pathway-program-usa). word_from: Choosing the english plus surfing program means combining rigorous morning academics with afternoon coastal action. Most students who arrive at our [San Diego language school](https://www.englishcollege.com/san-diego-ca/language-school) in California reach a solid working B2 level on the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR) in 12 weeks of full-time study. The catch: that timeline assumes you attend all 20 morning lessons per week and genuinely engage with your afternoon wave sessions. Location matters immensely for this track. A daily schedule that involves the ocean requires consistent waves and highly accessible beaches. Our campus provides exactly that environment. You spend your mornings focused on grammar, speaking, reading, and listening. After a short lunch break, you grab a board. The physical activity acts as a reset button for your mind. Yes, really. Students consistently report that they retain more vocabulary when they step out of the traditional classroom and use their new skills physically.
word_to: Escolher o programa english plus surfing significa combinar um aprendizado acadêmico rigoroso de manhã com a ação na costa à tarde. O único detalhe: esse prazo pressupõe que você participe de todas as 20 aulas matinais por semana e se dedique de verdade às sessões de surfe à tarde. A localização importa muito para essa trajetória. Uma rotina diária que envolve o oceano exige ondas consistentes e praias de fácil acesso. Nosso campus oferece exatamente esse ambiente. Você passa as manhãs focado em gramática, conversação, leitura e escuta. Após uma pausa curta para o almoço, você pega uma prancha. A atividade física funciona como um botão de reiniciar para a sua mente. Sim, é verdade. Os alunos sempre relatam que retêm mais vocabulário quando saem da sala de aula tradicional e usam suas novas habilidades fisicamente.

word_from: Paddling out with classmates forces you to communicate over the sound of the ocean. You shout warnings, encourage each other, and ask your coach for feedback in real-time. This program is not just an extended vacation. It maintains strict academic standards. The College of English Language holds dual accreditation from the Accrediting Council for Continuing Education and Training (ACCET) and the Commission on English Language Program Accreditation (CEA). This means your morning classes meet high institutional standards. You receive exactly the same core instruction as students enrolled in [General English](https://www.englishcollege.com/courses/general-english) taking a purely academic route, but your english plus surfing itinerary shifts entirely in the afternoon.

## Programs And Pathways
### Why should students explore our engaging course options at CEL?
Full accreditation and an average class size of just seven students back the decision to explore our engaging course offerings. Students who arrive at the College of English Language (CEL) choose between three campuses. You can study in Vancouver, British Columbia, or head south to San Diego, California, and Los Angeles, California. Every location runs the exact same curriculum. This small group size guarantees personal attention from experienced teachers. Whether you start a basic introductory program or prepare for higher education, general classes begin every single Monday. The school covers the complete Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR) scale. This means students progress steadily from beginner A1 and elementary A2 levels up through lower intermediate B1 and upper intermediate B2. Dedicated learners can eventually master advanced C1 and proficiency C2. The next weekly intake is always just days away. This keeps your timeline entirely flexible as you explore our engaging course structures across North America.

## Programas e Pathways

A acreditação total e turmas com média de apenas sete alunos respaldam a decisão de conhecer nossa oferta de cursos. Os estudantes que chegam ao College of English Language (CEL) escolhem entre três campi. Você pode estudar em Vancouver, na Colúmbia Britânica, ou seguir para o sul até San Diego, Califórnia, e Los Angeles, Califórnia. Cada unidade aplica exatamente o mesmo currículo. Seja para iniciar um programa básico ou se preparar para o ensino superior, as aulas gerais começam toda segunda-feira. A escola cobre toda a escala do Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR). Isso significa que os alunos progridem com firmeza dos níveis iniciante A1 e básico A2 até o intermediário B1 e intermediário superior B2. Alunos dedicados conseguem alcançar o nível avançado C1 e a proficiência C2. A próxima entrada semanal está sempre a poucos dias de distância. Essa estrutura mantém seu cronograma totalmente flexível enquanto você avalia as opções de estudo na América do Norte.

#### How do academic and exam preparation electives work?
Many students plan to attend university in North America. They need formal proof of their language abilities. Students who explore our engaging course tracks for higher education often choose specific electives. Preparation is available for the Test of English as a Foreign Language internet-Based Test (TOEFL iBT). You can also study for Cambridge English: First (FCE) and Cambridge English: Advanced (CAE). The International English Language Testing System (IELTS) is another common benchmark. You need an upper intermediate level to join these exam classes. Teachers help you understand the specific test structures. They review practice materials and teach time management strategies. Students aiming for college degrees can also take the [Global Pathway Preparation program](https://www.englishcollege.com/courses/global-pathway-preparation). This specific track builds academic skills for college success. It focuses on research, essay writing, and academic presentations.
